task.dependencies:
DCs:
e1: clean(facility_id: $facility_id1, facility_name: $facility_name1, address: $address1, city_town: $city_town1, state: $state1, zip_code: $zip_code1, county_parish: $county_parish1, telephone_number: $telephone_number1, measure_id: $measure_id1, measure_name: $measure_name1, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national1, score: $score1, footnote: $footnote1, start_date: $start_date1, end_date: $end_date1), clean(facility_id: $facility_id2, facility_name: $facility_name2, address: $address2, city_town: $city_town2, state: $state2, zip_code: $zip_code2, county_parish: $county_parish2, telephone_number: $telephone_number2, measure_id: $measure_id2, measure_name: $measure_name2, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national2, score: $score2, footnote: $footnote2, start_date: $start_date2, end_date: $end_date2), $facility_id1 == $facility_id2, $address1 != $address2 -> #fail.
e2: clean(facility_id: $facility_id1, facility_name: $facility_name1, address: $address1, city_town: $city_town1, state: $state1, zip_code: $zip_code1, county_parish: $county_parish1, telephone_number: $telephone_number1, measure_id: $measure_id1, measure_name: $measure_name1, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national1, score: $score1, footnote: $footnote1, start_date: $start_date1, end_date: $end_date1), clean(facility_id: $facility_id2, facility_name: $facility_name2, address: $address2, city_town: $city_town2, state: $state2, zip_code: $zip_code2, county_parish: $county_parish2, telephone_number: $telephone_number2, measure_id: $measure_id2, measure_name: $measure_name2, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national2, score: $score2, footnote: $footnote2, start_date: $start_date2, end_date: $end_date2), $facility_id1 == $facility_id2, $facility_name1 != $facility_name2 -> #fail.
e3: clean(facility_id: $facility_id1, facility_name: $facility_name1, address: $address1, city_town: $city_town1, state: $state1, zip_code: $zip_code1, county_parish: $county_parish1, telephone_number: $telephone_number1, measure_id: $measure_id1, measure_name: $measure_name1, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national1, score: $score1, footnote: $footnote1, start_date: $start_date1, end_date: $end_date1), clean(facility_id: $facility_id2, facility_name: $facility_name2, address: $address2, city_town: $city_town2, state: $state2, zip_code: $zip_code2, county_parish: $county_parish2, telephone_number: $telephone_number2, measure_id: $measure_id2, measure_name: $measure_name2, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national2, score: $score2, footnote: $footnote2, start_date: $start_date2, end_date: $end_date2), $facility_id1 == $facility_id2, $telephone_number1 != $telephone_number2 -> #fail.
e4: clean(facility_id: $facility_id1, facility_name: $facility_name1, address: $address1, city_town: $city_town1, state: $state1, zip_code: $zip_code1, county_parish: $county_parish1, telephone_number: $telephone_number1, measure_id: $measure_id1, measure_name: $measure_name1, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national1, score: $score1, footnote: $footnote1, start_date: $start_date1, end_date: $end_date1), clean(facility_id: $facility_id2, facility_name: $facility_name2, address: $address2, city_town: $city_town2, state: $state2, zip_code: $zip_code2, county_parish: $county_parish2, telephone_number: $telephone_number2, measure_id: $measure_id2, measure_name: $measure_name2, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national2, score: $score2, footnote: $footnote2, start_date: $start_date2, end_date: $end_date2), $zip_code1 == $zip_code2, $county_parish1 != $county_parish2 -> #fail.
e5: clean(facility_id: $facility_id1, facility_name: $facility_name1, address: $address1, city_town: $city_town1, state: $state1, zip_code: $zip_code1, county_parish: $county_parish1, telephone_number: $telephone_number1, measure_id: $measure_id1, measure_name: $measure_name1, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national1, score: $score1, footnote: $footnote1, start_date: $start_date1, end_date: $end_date1), clean(facility_id: $facility_id2, facility_name: $facility_name2, address: $address2, city_town: $city_town2, state: $state2, zip_code: $zip_code2, county_parish: $county_parish2, telephone_number: $telephone_number2, measure_id: $measure_id2, measure_name: $measure_name2, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national2, score: $score2, footnote: $footnote2, start_date: $start_date2, end_date: $end_date2), $zip_code1 == $zip_code2, $state1 != $state2 -> #fail.
e6: clean(facility_id: $facility_id1, facility_name: $facility_name1, address: $address1, city_town: $city_town1, state: $state1, zip_code: $zip_code1, county_parish: $county_parish1, telephone_number: $telephone_number1, measure_id: $measure_id1, measure_name: $measure_name1, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national1, score: $score1, footnote: $footnote1, start_date: $start_date1, end_date: $end_date1), clean(facility_id: $facility_id2, facility_name: $facility_name2, address: $address2, city_town: $city_town2, state: $state2, zip_code: $zip_code2, county_parish: $county_parish2, telephone_number: $telephone_number2, measure_id: $measure_id2, measure_name: $measure_name2, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national2, score: $score2, footnote: $footnote2, start_date: $start_date2, end_date: $end_date2), $telephone_number1 == $telephone_number2, $state1 != $state2 -> #fail.
e7: clean(facility_id: $facility_id1, facility_name: $facility_name1, address: $address1, city_town: $city_town1, state: $state1, zip_code: $zip_code1, county_parish: $county_parish1, telephone_number: $telephone_number1, measure_id: $measure_id1, measure_name: $measure_name1, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national1, score: $score1, footnote: $footnote1, start_date: $start_date1, end_date: $end_date1), clean(facility_id: $facility_id2, facility_name: $facility_name2, address: $address2, city_town: $city_town2, state: $state2, zip_code: $zip_code2, county_parish: $county_parish2, telephone_number: $telephone_number2, measure_id: $measure_id2, measure_name: $measure_name2, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national2, score: $score2, footnote: $footnote2, start_date: $start_date2, end_date: $end_date2), $measure_id1 == $measure_id2, $measure_name1 != $measure_name2 -> #fail.
e8: clean(facility_id: $facility_id1, facility_name: $facility_name1, address: $address1, city_town: $city_town1, state: $state1, zip_code: $zip_code1, county_parish: $county_parish1, telephone_number: $telephone_number1, measure_id: $measure_id1, measure_name: $measure_name1, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national1, score: $score1, footnote: $footnote1, start_date: $start_date1, end_date: $end_date1), clean(facility_id: $facility_id2, facility_name: $facility_name2, address: $address2, city_town: $city_town2, state: $state2, zip_code: $zip_code2, county_parish: $county_parish2, telephone_number: $telephone_number2, measure_id: $measure_id2, measure_name: $measure_name2, compared_to_national: $compared_to_national2, score: $score2, footnote: $footnote2, start_date: $start_date2, end_date: $end_date2), $measure_name1 == $measure_name2, $measure_id1 != $measure_id2 -> #fail.
